title: DA demands answers over Graaff-Reinet name change
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The Democratic Alliance (DA) has accused Minister of Sport, Arts and Culture, Gayton McKenzie, of misleading the public over proposed geographical name changes in the Eastern Cape, including the renaming of Graaff-Reinet to Robert Sobukwe Town.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The Democratic Alliance (DA) has accused Minister of Sport, Arts and Culture, Gayton McKenzie, of misleading the public over proposed geographical name changes in the Eastern Cape, including the renaming of Graaff-Reinet to Robert Sobukwe Town."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"According to the DA, McKenzie indicated about 18 months ago that he would not approve the Graaff-Reinet name change, stating at the time that more pressing national issues required attention."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"However, the minister has since signed off on 21 name changes across the province.","html":"However, the minister has since signed off on 21 name changes across the province."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"These include the renaming of East London to KuGompo City, Aberdeen to Xamdeboo, Adendorp to KwaMseki Bishop Limba, and Nieu-Bethesda to Kwa Noheleni.","html":"These include the renaming of East London to KuGompo City, Aberdeen to Xamdeboo, Adendorp to KwaMseki Bishop Limba, and Nieu-Bethesda to Kwa Noheleni."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"DA Dr Beyers Naudé Constituency Leader and Member of Parliament, Samantha Graham-Maré, said while the party supports the recognition of liberation figures and the restoration of historical dignity, the process followed in approving the changes is deeply concerning.","html":"DA Dr Beyers Naudé Constituency Leader and Member of Parliament, Samantha Graham-Maré, said while the party supports the recognition of liberation figures and the restoration of historical dignity, the process followed in approving the changes is deeply concerning."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“South Africa’s history requires honest reflection, and naming can play an important role in that process,” Graham-Maré said.","html":"“South Africa’s history requires honest reflection, and naming can play an important role in that process,” Graham-Maré said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“However, this must be done through lawful procedures, meaningful public consultation, and transparent decision-making.”","html":"“However, this must be done through lawful procedures, meaningful public consultation, and transparent decision-making.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more on sister publication, Graaff-Reinet Advertiser","html":"Read more on sister publication, Graaff-Reinet Advertiser"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: DA demands answers over Graaff-Reinet name change
